meta_title: For Freelancers: user onboarding to Solve stuck with basic apps (Intermediate Case Study)
meta_description: Learn how to user onboarding and overcome stuck with basic apps. A Intermediate-level Case Study using Antigravity and Claude Code.
h2_structure: The Problem: stuck with basic apps

content.seo_title: For Freelancers: User Onboarding to Scale SaaS Apps
content.seo_description: Stop building basic apps. Learn how to implement professional user onboarding using Antigravity and Claude Code to increase client retention and project value.
content.answer_block: To escape the 'basic app' trap, implement a data-driven onboarding flow using Antigravity for UI orchestration and Claude Code for rapid logic generation. By guiding users through a structured 'Aha!' moment within the first 60 seconds, you shift your output from simple CRUD to high-value, retention-focused SaaS products.
content.intro:
You’ve been there: the client is happy with the functional MVP, but the user retention metrics are flatlining. You aren't just building 'apps' anymore; you are building features that users abandon because they don't know where to start. The difference between a junior freelancer and a senior consultant is the ability to bridge the gap between 'working code' and 'engaged users.'

It is time to stop shipping static interfaces and start engineering experiences. By leveraging Antigravity for state-driven onboarding and Claude Code for rapid iterative logic, you can transform your delivery pipeline. This isn't just about adding tooltips; it's about architecting a conversion engine that makes your work indispensable to your clients.

steps.title: Define the 'Aha!' Moment
steps.description: Identify the one action that provides immediate value to the user. We will map this to an onboarding flow.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a user journey map for a SaaS onboarding flow that guides the user to their first successful data input in under 60 seconds.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --task 'Analyze codebase and identify the shortest path to the primary feature activation point'.

steps.title: Architect the Onboarding State Machine
steps.description: Use Antigravity to handle the complex state transitions of a multi-step onboarding wizard without cluttering your core components.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a state machine configuration for a 3-step onboarding wizard using a context-aware reactive pattern.
steps.claude_code_command: claude edit --file src/onboarding/machine.ts --prompt 'Implement a XState configuration for a 3-step onboarding flow'.

steps.title: Inject Interactive Tooltips
steps.description: Programmatically inject contextual guidance that doesn't feel like a distraction.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a reusable Tooltip component that leverages Antigravity's event system to trigger based on user scroll and input focus.

steps.title: Implement Progress Tracking
steps.description: Gamify the onboarding experience to ensure users finish the setup process.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Build a progress tracker component that calculates completion percentage based on the state machine's current index.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --task 'Create a ProgressIndicator component that subscribes to the onboarding state machine context'.

steps.title: Automate Onboarding Analytics
steps.description: Ensure every step of the onboarding is tracked so you can iterate based on actual user behavior.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Configure an telemetry hook that logs user progression through the onboarding flow to our analytics provider.
steps.claude_code_command: claude edit --file src/hooks/useOnboarding.ts --prompt 'Add analytics logging to every state transition in the onboarding machine'.

pro_tips: Never let users skip onboarding unless they have already completed the target 'Aha!' action in a previous session.
Use 'optimistic UI' updates during onboarding to make the app feel instantaneous, even if backend calls are pending.
Keep onboarding text under 15 words per screen; users scan, they don't read.
A/B test your onboarding CTA buttons; a change in color or micro-copy can often lift conversion by 10-15%.
Always store onboarding state in local storage so users can resume exactly where they left off if they refresh.
resources: User Onboarding UX Best Practices: https://nngroup.com/articles/onboarding
content.next_steps: Deploy your onboarding flow to a staging environment and use heatmaps to identify where users drop off during the setup process.
content.conversion_block: Stop settling for basic apps and start building high-performance, retention-led solutions that clients pay a premium for. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
